creator: mav@FreeBSD.org
text: My guess is that ses driver can not properly parse the Additional Element Status diagnostic page on this enclosure. Could you please show also output of `sg_ses -p 1 /dev/ses0`, `sg_ses -p 2 /dev/ses0`, `sg_ses -p 7 /dev/ses0` and `sg_ses -p 0xa /dev/ses0`.  `sg_ses` tool is from sysutils/sg3_utils port.
